---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Architecture Impact

- Does this require a new event type? (requires ADR + maintainer approval)
- Which layers are affected? (Core / Engine / Adapters / Surface / Frontend)
- Does this change the knowledge model or retrieval scoring?
- Does this affect federation semantics?

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
